name: HWR_SKILLS_CONNECTOR_B
description: This table will be used to store the list of configurations for the skill connector.

columns.Name: CONNECTOR_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Skill connector Id identifying the Skill connector entry in this table.

columns.Name: CONNECTOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the connector type . ex : profile

columns.Name: CONNECTOR_CONFIG
columns.Comments: The is the connector configuration. should be an xml.

columns.Name: DFF_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: This is the DFF Config  Id identifying the DFF CONFIG entry in the HWR_DFF_CONFIG_B.

columns.Name: APPLICATION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the  Id identifying an application (FND_APPLICATION)

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
